sourceInputs.userInstruction: Create a BIM seed model from this sketch and floorplan that is usable as the project starting point.

dominantVolumes.description: large smooth white upper wrapper shell
deep upper-front loggia inside a thick white frame
open-to-sky roof court cut into the upper right roof plane

nonNegotiables: white roof/wall wrapper must not read as a dark conventional roof
roof court/terrace must be visible as a cutout with return faces
front loggia must be recessed behind a thick white frame
ground floor and central upper pier use vertical cladding
stairs and occupied rooms must be present enough for project initiation
forbiddenOutcomes: generic gable roof on a box
semantic-only roof opening that does not render
conceptual mass elements left in the final envelope
room-separation workaround replacing real partitions and doors

requiredViews.purpose: Sketch-matched front-left axonometric showing wrapper, loggia, roof court, and ground cladding.
Front facade evidence for loggia bay rhythm, rail, ground openings, and cladding.
High axonometric proving the roof court reads as an occupied void.
Rear/right view checking roof-court depth and white return faces.
Ground-floor plan topology and room/stair/access check.
Upper-floor plan topology, roof-court access, loggia, and stair opening check.
Section/diagnostic view through the front loggia and wrapper frame.

assumptions.statement: Floorplan dimensions 14 m by 10 m override earlier approximate brief dimensions for this rebuild.
assumptions.validation: Cross-check generated exterior footprint and room target areas against source/floorplan.png dimensions.

assumptions.statement: The folded wrapper is assembled from typed walls, an asymmetric roof, frame sweeps, and return walls until a native folded-shell primitive exists.
assumptions.validation: Inspect vp-main-iso, vp-front-elev, and vp-roof-court screenshots for a continuous white wrapper silhouette.

assumptions.statement: Vertical cladding intent is carried by material/layer metadata; board grooves need live renderer review and may remain a visual tolerance.
assumptions.validation: Inspect front and side screenshots and material schedule rows for cladding_beige_grey on the ground base and loggia pier.
